prompt: Our React app has a custom modal dialog. Review the code and identify all WCAG accessibility issues (missing role=dialog, no focus management, span used as label, no Escape key handler, etc.)

expectations.evidence: Correctly identifies missing role='dialog', aria-modal='true', and aria-labelledby as SC 4.1.2 violation

expectations.text: Identifies missing focus management — focus not moved into modal on open (SC 2.4.3)
expectations.evidence: Explicitly identifies focus not being moved into dialog on open as SC 2.4.3 violation

expectations.text: Identifies no focus trap / keyboard users can Tab outside modal (SC 2.1.2)
expectations.evidence: Identifies no focus trap and keyboard users tabbing outside modal as SC 2.1.2 violation

expectations.text: Identifies span used instead of label for form inputs (SC 1.3.1)
expectations.evidence: Flags span elements instead of label elements, cites SC 1.3.1 and notes inputs lack programmatic association
Notes ARIA APG requires Escape to close dialogs and identifies this as SC 2.1.1 failure

expectations.text: Provides corrected code with proper ARIA attributes
expectations.evidence: Provides complete corrected React component with role=dialog, aria-modal, focus trap, Escape handler, label elements
